panelDelete.title: Delete panel '{{name}}'?
panelDelete.content: Are you sure you want to delete this panel? All content will be permanently lost.

linkDelete.title: Delete link?
linkDelete.content: Are you sure you want to delete this link?

warning.at_least_one_widget: Set at least one widget, otherwise there is no point in creating an empty panel

error.duplicity_name: An item with this name already exists in the system
